# Fixture 05 — Run-cycle expressions
# Plan §10.4: normalise to {frequency, days_of_week, days_of_month, cron}.

SCHEDULE WSA#MASTER#WEEKDAY_5AM
  ON RUNCYCLE EVERY_WEEKDAY VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0500
:
  J
    SCRIPTNAME "/bin/true"
    STREAMLOGON x
END

SCHEDULE WSA#MASTER#MONTH_END
  ON RUNCYCLE MONTHLY ON LAST WORKDAY VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 2300
:
  J
    SCRIPTNAME "/bin/true"
    STREAMLOGON x
END

SCHEDULE WSA#MASTER#FIRST_OF_MONTH
  ON RUNCYCLE MONTHLY ON 1ST VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0030
:
  J
    SCRIPTNAME "/bin/true"
    STREAMLOGON x
END

SCHEDULE WSA#MASTER#HOURLY
  ON RUNCYCLE DAILY EVERY HOUR VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0000 UNTIL 2359
:
  J
    SCRIPTNAME "/bin/true"
    STREAMLOGON x
END

# Custom calendar — parser should partially parse and warn cron=null
SCHEDULE WSA#MASTER#WEEKDAY_EXCEPT_HOLIDAYS
  ON RUNCYCLE WEEKDAY EXCEPT HOLIDAYS VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0530
:
  J
    SCRIPTNAME "/bin/true"
    STREAMLOGON x
END
